body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Daimon** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Phase Daimon bridge-v3 targeted acquisition.

**Corollary discharge function in healthy controls: Evidence about self-speech and external speech processing.** — The European journal of neuroscience (2023). PMID: 37635264. DOI: 10.1111/ejn.16125. Score: 38. As we speak, corollary discharge mechanisms suppress the auditory conscious perception of the self-generated voice in healthy subjects. This suppression has been associated with the attenuation of the auditory N1 component. To analyse this corollary discharge phenomenon (agency and ownership), we registered the event-related potentials of 42 healthy subjects.
